IsAPNdeg2¶

Given f a quadratic function defined over PolynomialRing(FiniteField(2,n)), it returns true if f is APN, false otherwise

 1IsAPNdeg2:= function(f)
 2R<x>:=Parent(f);
 3F:=BaseRing(R);
 4n:=Degree(F);
 5E:=Basis(F);
 6for a in F do
 7if a ne 0 then
 8           m:=Matrix(GF(Characteristic(F)),[Eltseq(Evaluate(f,x)-Evaluate(f,x+a)+Evaluate(f,a)):x in E]);
 9            if Rank(m) ne (n-1) then return false;
10            end if;
11    end if;
12 end for;
13return  true;
14end function;

Is_APN

Next topic
